name: zfmv_script_update_at_time
description: zFMV_Script::UpdateAtTime samples timeGetTime, converts milliseconds to seconds with the original 0.001f constant shape, and forwards to zFMV_Script::Update.
known_limits: VC5SP3 compile-only target coverage exists through zfmv_script_cleanup_reset; Binary Ninja byte comparison is still pending for zFMV_Script::UpdateAtTime.
Source dependencies are accepted as limited through zFMV_Script::Update's zInput provider debt.
